name: paragraph_on_page
raw_text:
Memory vault design

The vault renders memory cards in a container-query driven layout. Compact cards stay minimal even when the matched route is Chunk, while the ExpandedMemoryCard reveals the matched chunk evidence with chunk index, score, and a snippet of the winning child chunk.

Fusion weights

The hybrid fusion path now accepts a chunk signal alongside the existing vector and keyword signals. The chunk score contributes a small additive boost when it co-occurs with a keyword match, ensuring chunk-first retrieval reinforces lexical evidence rather than crowding it out.

Fallback behavior

If the BGE 1024 model assets are unavailable, the chunk route logs a single fallback line and yields zero hits. The legacy v4 MiniLM 384 parent path remains the durable readable surface, so the user never sees a hard failure when the additive chunk surface is missing.
must_contain: ExpandedMemoryCard reveals the matched chunk evidence
chunk score contributes a small additive boost
